# Relative Contributors (Strat. PICRUSt)

### Load libraries

```{r}

#install.packages("BiocManager")
#BiocManager::install("ComplexHeatmap")
#install.packages("pheatmap")

library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(phyloseq)
library(ggpicrust2)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
#install.packages("ggtext")
library(ggtext)
```

### Functional abundance (MM - PICRUSt)

```{r}
# Load datasets

meta = readRDS('../Datasets/phyloseq_taxonomy.rds') %>% 
  .@sam_data %>% data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column('sample_names')

path = read.delim('../Datasets/path_abun_unstrat.tsv', 
                  row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)

# Keep only samples present in both metadata and pathway table
common_samples <- intersect(meta$sample_names, colnames(path))

meta <- meta %>%
  filter(sample_names %in% common_samples)

path <- path %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(common_samples))

meta <- meta %>%
  slice(match(colnames(path), sample_names))

# Set 10 days as reference level
meta$Time_of_Collection_categorical <- factor(
  meta$Time_of_Collection_categorical,
  levels = c("10_days", "30_days"))

dose_levels <- unique(meta$dose)

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Aim3: 
# Compare functional pathways between 
# 10d vs 30d across different radiation dose groups
# --------------------------------------------------------

# Run differential analysis seperately for each radiation dose (0.0, 0.1, 0.25)
all_results <- lapply(dose_levels, function(d) { 
  
  meta_d <- meta %>% filter(dose == d)
 
  path_filt <- path %>% dplyr::select(all_of(meta_d$sample_names))
  
  meta_d <- meta_d %>% slice(match(colnames(path_filt), sample_names))
  
  res <- pathway_daa(
    abundance  = path_filt,
    metadata   = meta_d,
    group      = "Time_of_Collection_categorical",
    daa_method = "LinDA",
    reference  = "10_days")
  res$dose <- d
  res
})

# Combine all dose results into one dataframe
daa_results_df <- bind_rows(all_results)

# Apply threshold & Keep only statistically significant pathways
significant <- daa_results_df %>%
  filter(p_adjust < 0.05, abs(log2_fold_change) > 1) %>%
  arrange(dose, p_adjust) %>%
  select(dose, feature, log2_fold_change, p_values, p_adjust, group1, group2) %>%
  mutate(direction = ifelse(log2_fold_change > 0, "Higher at 30_days", "Higher at 10_days"))
significant #37 pathways found
```

### Relative contributors (strat. PICRUSt)

```{r}

# Load datasets
path_contrib = read.delim('../Datasets/path_abun_contrib.tsv.gz', check.names = FALSE)
taxonomy = read.delim('../Datasets/taxonomy.tsv', check.names = FALSE)
```

#### w/ ggplot

-   <div>

    ```{r}
    # Wrangling for visualization :')

    extract_family = function(tax_string) {
      parts = strsplit(tax_string, "; ")[[1]]
      family_part = parts[grepl("^f__", parts)]
      if(length(family_part) > 0) {
        return(gsub("^f__", "", family_part[1]))
      } else {
        return("Unclassified")
      }
    }

    taxonomy = taxonomy %>%
      mutate(family = sapply(Taxon, extract_family))

    taxon_to_family = taxonomy %>%
      select(`Feature ID`, family) %>%
      distinct()

    path_contrib_with_family = path_contrib %>%
      left_join(taxon_to_family, by = c('taxon' = 'Feature ID')) %>%
      mutate(taxon_name = ifelse(is.na(family), taxon, family))

    contrib_joined = path_contrib_with_family %>%
      left_join(meta %>% select(sample_names, dose_categorical, Time_of_Collection_categorical),
        by = c('sample' = 'sample_names'))

    all_pathways_by_dose = significant %>%
      select(dose, feature) %>%
      mutate(dose_categorical = paste0(dose, '_dose'))

    top_taxa = contrib_joined %>%
      inner_join(all_pathways_by_dose,
                 by = c('function' = 'feature',
                        'dose_categorical' = 'dose_categorical')) %>%
      group_by(taxon_name) %>%
      summarise(total = sum(norm_taxon_function_contrib), .groups = 'drop') %>%
      pull(taxon_name)

    ### Mean contribution per group
    contrib_summary = contrib_joined %>%
      inner_join(all_pathways_by_dose,
                 by = c('function' = 'feature',
                        'dose_categorical' = 'dose_categorical')) %>%
      group_by(`function`, taxon_name, dose_categorical, Time_of_Collection_categorical) %>%
      summarise(mean_contrib = mean(norm_taxon_function_contrib, na.rm = TRUE), 
                .groups = 'drop') %>%
      mutate(taxon_short = taxon_name,
             dose_label  = factor(dose_categorical,
                                  levels = c('0_dose', '0.1_dose', '0.25_dose', '1_dose'),
                                  labels = c('0 Gy\n(Sham)', '0.1 Gy', '0.25 Gy', '1 Gy')),
             time_label  = factor(Time_of_Collection_categorical,
                                  levels = c('10_days', '30_days'),
                                  labels = c('10 Days Post-IR', '30 Days Post-IR')))

    # Adding pathway descriptions into contrib_summary
    pathway_descriptions <- pathway_annotation(
      pathway = "MetaCyc",
      daa_results_df = significant,
      ko_to_kegg = FALSE
    ) %>%
      select(feature, description) %>%
      distinct()

    contrib_summary <- contrib_summary %>%
      left_join(pathway_descriptions, by = c("function" = "feature")) %>%
      mutate(pathway_label = ifelse(is.na(description), `function`, description))

    # Difference heatmap (30 days - 10 days)
    contrib_diff <- contrib_summary %>%
      select(taxon_short, `function`, pathway_label, dose_label, time_label, mean_contrib) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = time_label,
                  values_from = mean_contrib,
                  values_fill = 0) %>%
      mutate(diff = `30 Days Post-IR` - `10 Days Post-IR`)

    lim <- max(abs(range(contrib_diff$diff, na.rm = TRUE)))

    ggplot(contrib_diff, aes(x = taxon_short, y = pathway_label, fill = diff)) +
      geom_tile() +
      geom_tile(fill = NA, color = 'white', linewidth = 0.25) +
      geom_text(aes(label = round(diff, 3)), size = 2.5, color = 'black') +
      scale_fill_gradientn(
        colors = c('#2166ac', '#4575b4', '#91bfdb', '#d1e5f0', '#d3d3d3', '#fddbc7', '#f4a582', '#d6604d', '#b2182b'),
        values = scales::rescale(c(-lim, -lim*0.5, -lim*0.2, -0.05, 0, 0.05, lim*0.2, lim*0.5, lim)),
        limits = c(-lim, lim),
        name = 'Difference\n(30d - 10d)') +
      facet_grid(dose_label ~ ., scales = 'free_y', space = 'free_y') +
      theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
      theme(
        axis.text.y       = element_text(size = 10, color = 'black'),
        axis.title        = element_text(color = 'black'),
        strip.background  = element_rect(fill = 'grey85', color = NA),
        strip.text        = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 10),
        panel.spacing     = unit(0.5, 'lines'),
        panel.grid.major  = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor  = element_blank(),
        panel.border      = element_rect(color = 'grey70', fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5),
        legend.position   = 'right',
        legend.key.height = unit(1.2, 'cm'),
        axis.text.x       = ggtext::element_markdown(
          angle = 40, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = 'italic', color = 'black')
      ) +
      scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) {
        highlight <- c('Enterobacteriaceae', 'Burkholderiaceae',
                       'Lachnospiraceae', 'Oscillospiraceae')
        ifelse(x %in% highlight,
               paste0("<span style='color:#2166ac'>", x, "</span>"),
               x)
      }) +
      labs(
        x = 'Contributing Family',
        y = 'Function',
        title = 'Change in Taxon Contributions by Dose (30 Days - 10 Days)',
      )

    ggsave('../Results/YH_functional_contrib_heatmapDIFF(family).png', width = 14, height = 12, dpi = 300)



    ##############################################################
    ##################### SHAM COMPARISON ########################
    ############################################################

    # Get sham contributions separately for each timepoint
    sham_contrib <- contrib_summary %>%
      filter(dose_categorical == '0_dose') %>%
      select(taxon_short, `function`, pathway_label, time_label, mean_contrib) %>%
      rename(sham_contrib = mean_contrib)

    # Calculate difference--> irradiated - sham at each timepoint
    contrib_diff_vs_sham <- contrib_summary %>%
      filter(dose_categorical %in% c('0.1_dose', '1_dose')) %>%
      left_join(sham_contrib,
                by = c('taxon_short', 'function', 'pathway_label', 'time_label')) %>%
      mutate(sham_contrib = replace_na(sham_contrib, 0),
             diff = mean_contrib - sham_contrib)

    contrib_diff_vs_sham_delta <- contrib_diff_vs_sham %>%
      select(taxon_short, `function`, pathway_label, dose_label, time_label, diff) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = time_label,
                  values_from = diff,
                  values_fill = 0) %>%
      mutate(delta = `30 Days Post-IR` - `10 Days Post-IR`)

    lim_sham <- max(abs(range(contrib_diff_vs_sham$diff, na.rm = TRUE)))

    ggplot(contrib_diff_vs_sham, aes(x = taxon_short, y = pathway_label, fill = diff)) +
      geom_tile() +
      geom_tile(fill = NA, color = 'white', linewidth = 0.25) +
      geom_text(aes(label = round(diff, 3)), size = 2.5, color = 'black') +
      scale_fill_gradientn(
        colors = c('#2166ac', '#4575b4', '#91bfdb', '#d1e5f0', '#d3d3d3',
                   '#fddbc7', '#f4a582', '#d6604d', '#b2182b'),
        values = scales::rescale(c(-lim_sham, -lim_sham*0.5, -lim_sham*0.2, -0.05, 0,
                                    0.05, lim_sham*0.2, lim_sham*0.5, lim_sham)),
        limits = c(-lim_sham, lim_sham),
        name = 'Difference\n(Irradiated - Sham)') +
      facet_grid(dose_label ~ time_label, scales = 'free_y', space = 'free_y') +
      theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
      theme(
        axis.text.y       = element_text(size = 10, color = 'black'),
        axis.title        = element_text(color = 'black'),
        strip.background  = element_rect(fill = 'grey85', color = NA),
        strip.text        = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 10),
        panel.spacing     = unit(0.5, 'lines'),
        panel.grid.major  = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor  = element_blank(),
        panel.border      = element_rect(color = 'grey70', fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5),
        legend.position   = 'right',
        legend.key.height = unit(1.2, 'cm'),
        axis.text.x       = ggtext::element_markdown(
          angle = 40, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = 'italic', color = 'black')
      ) +
      labs(
        x     = 'Contributing Family',
        y     = NULL,
        title = 'Taxon Contribution Difference vs Sham Control',
      )

    ggsave('../Results/YH_functional_contrib_heatmapDIFF_vsSham(family).png',
           width = 20, height = 10, dpi = 300)

    sham_check <- path_contrib_with_family %>%
      left_join(meta %>% select(sample_names, dose_categorical, Time_of_Collection_categorical),
                by = c('sample' = 'sample_names')) %>%
      filter(dose_categorical == '0_dose',
             `function` %in% significant$feature) %>%
      group_by(`function`, taxon_name) %>%
      summarise(mean_contrib = mean(norm_taxon_function_contrib, na.rm = TRUE),
                n_nonzero = sum(norm_taxon_function_contrib > 0),
                .groups = 'drop') %>%
      filter(mean_contrib > 0)

    print(sham_check)
    cat("Number of family-pathway combos with non-zero sham contributions:", nrow(sham_check), "\n")
    ```

    ```         
    ```

    </div>

```{r}
# SHAM FIXED
significant_pathways = significant$feature

sham_contrib_fixed <- path_contrib_with_family %>%
  left_join(meta %>% select(sample_names, dose_categorical, Time_of_Collection_categorical),
            by = c('sample' = 'sample_names')) %>%
  filter(dose_categorical == '0_dose',
         `function` %in% significant_pathways) %>%
  left_join(pathway_descriptions, by = c('function' = 'feature')) %>%
  mutate(
    pathway_label = ifelse(is.na(description), `function`, description),
    taxon_short = taxon_name,
    time_label = factor(Time_of_Collection_categorical,
                        levels = c('10_days', '30_days'),
                        labels = c('10 Days Post-IR', '30 Days Post-IR'))
  ) %>%
  group_by(`function`, pathway_label, taxon_short, time_label) %>%
  summarise(sham_contrib = mean(norm_taxon_function_contrib, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = 'drop')

# Irradiated - sham diff.
contrib_diff_vs_sham_fixed <- contrib_summary %>%
  filter(dose_categorical %in% c('0.1_dose', '1_dose')) %>%
  left_join(sham_contrib_fixed,
            by = c('taxon_short', 'pathway_label', 'time_label')) %>%
  mutate(sham_contrib = replace_na(sham_contrib, 0),
         diff = mean_contrib - sham_contrib)

# Visualize
lim_sham <- max(abs(range(contrib_diff_vs_sham_fixed$diff, na.rm = TRUE)))

ggplot(contrib_diff_vs_sham_fixed, aes(x = taxon_short, y = pathway_label, fill = diff)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_tile(fill = NA, color = 'white', linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(diff, 3)), size = 2.5, color = 'black') +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c('#2166ac', '#4575b4', '#91bfdb', '#d1e5f0', '#d3d3d3',
               '#fddbc7', '#f4a582', '#d6604d', '#b2182b'),
    values = scales::rescale(c(-lim_sham, -lim_sham*0.5, -lim_sham*0.2, -0.05, 0,
                                0.05, lim_sham*0.2, lim_sham*0.5, lim_sham)),
    limits = c(-lim_sham, lim_sham),
    name = 'Difference\n(Irradiated - Sham)') +
  facet_grid(dose_label ~ time_label, scales = 'free_y', space = 'free_y') +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y       = element_text(size = 10, color = 'black'),
    axis.title        = element_text(color = 'black'),
    strip.background  = element_rect(fill = 'grey85', color = NA),
    strip.text        = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 10),
    panel.spacing     = unit(0.5, 'lines'),
    panel.grid.major  = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor  = element_blank(),
    panel.border      = element_rect(color = 'grey70', fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5),
    legend.position   = 'right',
    legend.key.height = unit(1.2, 'cm'),
    axis.text.x       = ggtext::element_markdown(
      angle = 40, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = 'italic', color = 'black')
  ) +
  labs(
    x     = 'Contributing Family',
    y     = NULL,
    title = 'Taxon Contribution Difference vs Sham Control',
  )

ggsave('../Results/YH_functional_contrib_heatmapDIFF_vsSham(family)_FIXED.png',
       width = 20, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```

### Correlation analysis

```{r}
# Load phyloseq object
ps_obj = readRDS('../Datasets/phyloseq_taxonomy.rds')

ps_genus = ps_obj %>%
    tax_glom(taxrank = "Genus") %>%
    transform_sample_counts(function(x) x/sum(x)*100)
  
  genus_abund = as.data.frame(otu_table(ps_genus))
  if(taxa_are_rows(ps_genus)) genus_abund = t(genus_abund)
  
  # Clean family names
  tax_genus = as.data.frame(tax_table(ps_genus))
  genus_names = gsub("g__", "", tax_genus$Genus)
  genus_names[is.na(genus_names) | genus_names == ""] = "Unclassified"
  colnames(genus_abund) = trimws(genus_names)

# Converting to long
genus_names = make.unique(genus_names)
  
  colnames(genus_abund) = trimws(genus_names)

genus_abund_long = genus_abund %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("sample") %>%
  pivot_longer(-sample, names_to = "taxon_name", values_to = "abundance")

# Significant pathways only
significant_pathways = significant$feature

# Geting contribution data at sample-taxon-pathway level

extract_genus = function(tax_string) {
  parts = strsplit(tax_string, "; ")[[1]]
  genus_part = parts[grepl("^g__", parts)]
  if(length(genus_part) > 0) {
    return(gsub("^g__", "", genus_part[1]))
  } else {
    return("Unclassified")
  }
}

taxonomy_genus = taxonomy %>%
  mutate(genus = sapply(Taxon, extract_genus))

taxon_to_genus = taxonomy_genus %>%
  select(`Feature ID`, genus) %>%
  distinct()

path_contrib_with_genus = path_contrib %>%
  left_join(taxon_to_genus, by = c('taxon' = 'Feature ID')) %>%
  mutate(taxon_name = ifelse(is.na(genus), taxon, genus))

contrib_sample_level_genus = path_contrib_with_genus %>%
  filter(`function` %in% significant_pathways) %>%
  group_by(sample, taxon_name, `function`) %>%
  summarise(contribution = sum(norm_taxon_function_contrib, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

# Keeping only samples and taxa present in both datasets
correlation_data = genus_abund_long %>%
  inner_join(contrib_sample_level_genus, by = c("sample", "taxon_name"))

correlation_data = correlation_data %>%
  left_join(meta %>% select(sample_names, dose, Time_of_Collection_categorical), 
            by = c("sample" = "sample_names"))

correlation_data = correlation_data %>%
  left_join(pathway_descriptions, by = c("function" = "feature")) %>%
  mutate(pathway_label = ifelse(is.na(description), `function`, description))

```

```{r}

# Corr. for each condition (w/ error handling)
calculate_correlations <- function(data, dose_val, time_val, min_samples = 4) {
  
  # Subset data
  subset_data = data %>%
    filter(dose == dose_val, Time_of_Collection_categorical == time_val)
  
  if(nrow(subset_data) < 3) return(NULL)
  
  # Correlation for each taxon-pathway pair
  results = subset_data %>%
    group_by(taxon_name, `function`, pathway_label) %>%
    summarise(
      n_samples = n(),
      # caluclate if enough samples + variation in both variables
      correlation = if(n() >= min_samples & var(abundance) > 0 & var(contribution) > 0) {
        cor(abundance, contribution, method = "spearman")
      } else {
        NA_real_
      },
      p_value = if(n() >= min_samples & var(abundance) > 0 & var(contribution) > 0) {
        cor.test(abundance, contribution, method = "spearman")$p.value
      } else {
        NA_real_
      },
      mean_abundance = mean(abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_contribution = mean(contribution, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(correlation)) %>%
    mutate(
      dose = dose_val,
      time = time_val,
      significant = ifelse(!is.na(p_value), p_value < 0.05, FALSE),
      direction = ifelse(correlation > 0, "positive", "negative"),
      strength = case_when(
        abs(correlation) >= 0.7 ~ "strong",
        abs(correlation) >= 0.5 ~ "moderate",
        abs(correlation) >= 0.3 ~ "weak",
        TRUE ~ "negligible"
      )
    )
  
  return(results)
}

# Run for each combination of dose and time...
dose_levels = c(0, 0.1, 0.25, 1)
time_points = c("10_days", "30_days")

all_results = list()

for(d in dose_levels) {
  for(t in time_points) {
    cat("\nCalculating for dose =", d, "Gy, time =", t, "\n")
    all_results[[paste0(d, "_", t)]] = calculate_correlations(correlation_data, d, t, min_samples = 4)
  }
}

# Combining results
correlation_df = bind_rows(all_results)

# Significant positive correlations only
functional_drivers = correlation_df %>%
  filter(
    direction == "positive",
    significant == TRUE,
    strength %in% c("strong", "moderate")
  ) %>%
  arrange(dose, time, desc(correlation))

if(nrow(functional_drivers) > 0) {
  cat("\nTOP FUNCTIONAL DRIVERS:\n")
  print(functional_drivers %>% 
          select(taxon_name, pathway_label, dose, time, correlation, strength, n_samples) %>%
          head(20))
} else {
  cat("\nNo strong/moderate correlations. Showing all significant positive:\n")
  all_sig = correlation_df %>%
    filter(direction == "positive", significant == TRUE) %>%
    arrange(dose, time, desc(correlation))
  
  if(nrow(all_sig) > 0) {
    print(all_sig %>% 
            select(taxon_name, pathway_label, dose, time, correlation, n_samples) %>%
            head(20))
  } else {
    cat("No significant positive correlations found.\n")
    cat("Showing all correlations (any direction) with p < 0.05:\n")
    correlation_df %>%
      filter(significant == TRUE) %>%
      select(taxon_name, pathway_label, dose, time, correlation, direction) %>%
      head(20) %>%
      print()
  }
}
```

```{r}
# Pathways are higher at 10_days
decreased_pathways = significant %>%
  filter(direction == "Higher at 10_days") %>%
  select(dose, feature)

print(decreased_pathways)

# Filter
functional_drivers_focused = functional_drivers %>%
  inner_join(decreased_pathways, by = c("dose", "function" = "feature"))

# Check persistence! (which taxa maintain correlation at both 10d and 30d)
persistent_focused = functional_drivers_focused %>%
  select(taxon_name, pathway_label, dose, time, correlation) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = time,
    values_from = correlation,
    values_fill = NA
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(`10_days`), !is.na(`30_days`)) %>%
  mutate(
    persistent = `10_days` >= 0.5 & `30_days` >= 0.5,
    transient = `10_days` >= 0.5 & `30_days` < 0.5
  )
```

```{r}
# PRIORITY MATRIX

priority_matrix_simple = functional_drivers_focused %>%
  select(taxon_name, pathway_label, time, correlation) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = time,
    values_from = correlation,
    values_fill = NA
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    persistent = !is.na(`10_days`) & !is.na(`30_days`),
    corr_10d = `10_days`,
    corr_30d = `30_days`
  ) %>%
  select(taxon_name, pathway_label, corr_10d, corr_30d, persistent) %>%
  arrange(desc(persistent), desc(corr_10d))

print(priority_matrix_simple)

write.csv(priority_matrix_simple, "../Results/aim4_priority_matrix_genus.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
